alkylation reagent: alkylated with 10 mM Iodoacetamide for 30 minutes in the dark
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 10 mM Iodoacetamide for 30 minutes in the dark
cleavage agent: first digested with LysC (1:50; enzyme:protein, Wako) for 12 hours at 25°C
collision energy: CID (quadrupole isolation set at 0.5 Da and ion trap analysis, AGC 8 × 103, NCE 35, maximum injection time 150 ms)
fragmentation method: precursors were fragmented by HCD prior to Orbitrap analysis
instrument: analyzed with an LC-MS3 data collection strategy on an Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer
labeling: labeled with tandem mass tag (TMT10) reagents
reduction reagent: reduced with 5 mM DTT for 30 min
reduction concentration: reduced with 5 mM DTT for 30 min
